title: div>
content:
div>

LI, early 40’s, real estate agent and interior design - she grew up quite poor, her father owned slums and projects in Brooklyn (he always wanted to be a producer, big shot, hot shot and never was), and because she was so poor she wanted to be a housewife who was taken care of. Big Spender. Her mother recently lost her mind to dementia and its taking a toll on her, both mother and daughter battle with bipolar disorder and she’s afraid the same disease is coming for her. She is feeling the middle of her life hard and wants to be in love with someone again. She’s sick of her husband, but has always been faithful to him. She likes her son just a little better than she likes her daughter. Her and her son fight because he has his dad’s sense of humor, she fights with her daughter because they have similar mood swings. Well dressed, paints at night, is to thanks for the beautiful house they live in (decorating wise). Only goes to church on the big holidays, prays once in a blue moon.

FRE, late 40’s, architect - suffers from depression and wanting something new, never really ever truly finding pride in his entire life. He felt as if he’s been cheated from having a great life (similarly to BET’s dad). His father was successful in contracting and the complete opposite of his father, who is even tempered and well even keeled. Him and his dad both sing the wrong lyrics to songs and sing completely out of tune. Tried to run away from his family multiple times. Lies often and believes his lies, sometimes. Quite talented, but is incapable of getting out of his own way. He has a black cloud constantly following him.
